appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance sections for code-inspection, unit-tests, and qemu-visual surfaces

notes: All 23 content-types milestone assertions passed. 3 subagent groups: code-build (5 assertions), unit-tests (15 assertions), visual (3 assertions). QEMU visual testing confirmed grayscale AA text rendering (510 text pixels all have R=G=B with zero color difference), cursor visibility as background-colored container, and 37-second stability with zero panics. Interactive QEMU testing (typing, selection, cursor movement) not possible in headless mode — static frame + stability test used as evidence for VAL-FILL-02 and VAL-CROSS-04. 1,801 tests passing (baseline 1,791).
